flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Anderson University fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (62.9% → 53.8%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Anderson University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.0k → $37.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Anderson University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.0k → $37.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Anderson University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (54.4% → 47.7%).
